description: A well-qualified, clearly-articulated applicant with a straightforward pathway match. The baseline 'everything works' case.

opportunity.primaryGoal: Transition into a senior data analyst role

evidenceRecords.content: I want to move from a generalist analyst role into a senior, specialized analytics position within 3 months.
Currently a Data Analyst at Acme Corp, 4 years experience with SQL and Python.
Available 10 hours/week for coursework, evenings and weekends.

output_schema_constraints: every observedFacts[] entry cites a sourceRef present in evidenceRecords
fitStatus is strong_fit or possible_fit given the clear role/timeline/experience alignment
no guarantee language anywhere in candidateSummary/fitRationale/nextAction
